title: WiThrottle handset
subtitle: Pair Engine Driver or WiThrottle with BigFred and choose which locomotives you may drive.

alerts.noServer: No command station on this layout has the WiThrottle server enabled. Ask an admin to turn it on under

fields.allowAllVehicles: All vehicles I have permission to drive on this layout
fields.handsetBrakeSecsHint: {{min}}–{{max}} seconds without handset communication with BigFred

status.keepaliveHint: After {{seconds}} seconds without communication with BigFred, trains controlled by the handset are emergency-stopped

pending.title: Pairing code
pending.instructions:
In Engine Driver or WiThrottle:
• Acquire the “Pair with BigFred” sentinel loco from the roster and press function keys F0–F9 for each digit (e.g. 1 2 2 1 4 5), or
• Set Device Name (N) to the six-digit code without spaces.
